items.title: Modules & Imports
items.description: os and pathlib are standard-library modules you import like any other; the import system decides how they're found.

items.title: Virtual Environments & venv
items.description: Environment variables read via os.environ are typically set per-environment alongside virtualenv/venv setup.

items.title: Error & Exception Handling
items.description: File and path operations can raise (missing file, permission denied); handle them with try/except.
